content: Create an expression that concatenates EmployeeName and PrimaryEmail columns with a space in between. Output type should be Text.

This expression will join the employee's name and primary email address into a single text string, separated by a space.

```
Concat(EmployeeName, " ", PrimaryEmail)
```
This expression will produce a **Text** output.

Suggested column name: **Employee Contact Info**
{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Revise this expression|Create new column|Test with my data|Explain this expression}}
